# kSecMatchBits

**Global Variable**

The access control list should be owned by users whose ID matches the specified user ID or who are members of a group whose ID matches the specified group ID parameter.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecMatchBits: Int { get }
```
title: kSecMatchBits
